top_sql.query: with scoped_matches as ( select fm.match_id, fm.date_day, case when fm.home_team_id = $1 then coalesce(fm.home_goals, $10) else coalesce(fm.away_goals, $11) end as goals_for, case when fm.home_team_id = $2 then coalesce(fm.away_goals, $12) else coalesce(fm.home_goals, $13) end as goals_against, row_number() over ( order by fm.date_day desc, fm.match_id desc ) as rn_recent from mart.fact_matches fm where $14=$15 and (fm.home_team_id = $3 or fm.away_team_id = $4) and fm.league_id = any($5) and fm.season = $6 ), filtered_scoped as ( select * from scoped_matches where ($7::int is null or rn_recent <= $8) ) , scoped_lineups as ( select fl.player_id, coalesce(dp.player_name, fl.player_name) as player_name, fl.position_name, fl.jersey_number, coalesce(fl.is_starter, $16) as is_starter, coalesce(fl.minutes_played, $17) as minutes_played, fl.match_id, fs.date_day, row_number() over ( partition by fl.player_id order by fs.date_day desc, fl.match_id desc, fl.lineup_id desc ) as rn_latest from mart.fact_fixture_lineups fl inner join filtered_scoped fs on fs.match_id = fl.match_id left join mart.dim_player dp on dp.player_id = fl.player_id where fl.team_id = $9 ), latest_context as ( select player_id, position_name, jersey_number from scoped_lineups where rn_latest = $18 ), aggregated as ( select sl.player_id, max(sl.player_name) as player_name, count(distinct sl.match_id)::int as appearances, sum(case when sl.is_starter then $19 else $20 end)::int as starts, sum(sl.minutes_played)::int as minutes_played, round(avg(sl.minutes_played)::numeric, $21) as average_minutes, max(sl.date_day) as last_appearance_at from scoped_lineups sl group by sl.player_id ) select a.player_id::text as player_id, a.player_name, lc.position_name, lc.jersey_number, a.appearances, a.starts, a.minutes_played, a.average_minutes, a.last_appearance_at from aggregated a left join latest_context lc on lc.player_id = a.player_id order by a.minutes_played desc, a.starts desc, a.player_name asc

select fps.player_id::text as player_id, fps.player_name, fps.team_id::text as team_id, coalesce(fps.team_name, team.team_name) as team_name, fps.position_name, fps.is_starter, fps.minutes_played, fps.goals, fps.assists, fps.shots_total, fps.shots_on_goal, fps.passes_total, fps.key_passes, fps.tackles, fps.interceptions, fps.duels, fps.fouls_committed, fps.yellow_cards, fps.red_cards, fps.goalkeeper_saves, fps.clean_sheets, fps.xg, fps.rating from mart.fact_fixture_player_stats fps left join mart.dim_team team on team.team_id = fps.team_id where fps.match_id = $1 order by fps.team_id asc, fps.rating desc nulls last, fps.player_name asc

select ffl.player_id::text as player_id, ffl.player_name, ffl.team_id::text as team_id, team.team_name as team_name, ffl.position_name as position, ffl.formation_field, ffl.formation_position, ffl.jersey_number as shirt_number, ffl.is_starter, ffl.minutes_played from mart.fact_fixture_lineups ffl left join mart.dim_team team on team.team_id = ffl.team_id where ffl.match_id = $1 order by ffl.team_id asc, ffl.is_starter desc, ffl.formation_position asc nulls last, ffl.jersey_number asc nulls last, ffl.player_name asc

with scoped_matches as ( select fm.match_id, fm.date_day, case when fm.home_team_id = $1 then coalesce(fm.home_goals, $11) else coalesce(fm.away_goals, $12) end as goals_for, case when fm.home_team_id = $2 then coalesce(fm.away_goals, $13) else coalesce(fm.home_goals, $14) end as goals_against, row_number() over ( order by fm.date_day desc, fm.match_id desc ) as rn_recent from mart.fact_matches fm where $15=$16 and (fm.home_team_id = $3 or fm.away_team_id = $4) and fm.league_id = any($5) and fm.season = $6 ), filtered_scoped as ( select * from scoped_matches where ($7::int is null or rn_recent <= $8) ) , available_matches as ( select count(distinct fl.match_id)::int as available_count from mart.fact_fixture_lineups fl inner join filtered_scoped fs on fs.match_id = fl.match_id where fl.team_id = $9 ), raw_matches as ( select count(distinct rl.fixture_id)::int as total_count from raw.fixture_lineups rl inner join filtered_scoped fs on fs.match_id = rl.fixture_id where rl.team_id = $10 ) select coalesce((select available_count from available_matches), $17) as available_count, coalesce((select total_count from raw_matches), $18) as total_count

with scoped as ( select pms.player_id, pms.team_id, pms.team_name, pms.match_id, pms.match_date, coalesce(pms.minutes_played, $7) as minutes_played, coalesce(pms.goals, $8) as goals, coalesce(pms.assists, $9) as assists, coalesce(pms.shots_total, $10) as shots_total, coalesce(pms.shots_on_goal, $11) as shots_on_goal, coalesce(pms.passes_total, $12) as passes_total, pms.rating, row_number() over ( partition by pms.player_id order by pms.match_date desc, pms.match_id desc ) as rn_recent from mart.player_match_summary pms inner join mart.fact_matches fm on fm.match_id = pms.match_id where pms.player_id = $1 and $13=$14 and fm.league_id = any($2) and fm.season = $3 ), filtered_scoped as ( select * from scoped where ($4::int is null or rn_recent <= $5) ) select fs.match_id::text as fixture_id, fs.match_id::text as match_id, fs.match_date as played_at, dc.league_id::text as competition_id, dc.league_name as competition_name, fm.season::text as season_id, fm.round_number::text as round_id, fs.team_id::text as team_id, coalesce(fs.team_name, player_team.team_name) as team_name, case when fs.team_id = fm.home_team_id then away_team.team_id else home_team.team_id end::text as opponent_team_id, case when fs.team_id = fm.home_team_id then away_team.team_name else home_team.team_name end as opponent_name, case when fs.team_id = fm.home_team_id then $15 else $16 end as venue_role, case when fs.team_id = fm.home_team_id then coalesce(fm.home_goals, $17) else coalesce(fm.away_goals, $18) end as goals_for, case when fs.team_id = fm.home_team_id then coalesce(fm.away_goals, $19) else coalesce(fm.home_goals, $20) end as goals_against, fs.minutes_played, fs.goals, fs.assists, fs.shots_total, fs.shots_on_goal, fs.passes_total, fs.rating from filtered_scoped fs inner join mart.fact_matches fm on fm.match_id = fs.match_id inner join mart.dim_competition dc on dc.competition_sk = fm.competition_sk left join mart.dim_team home_team on home_team.team_id = fm.home_team_id left join mart.dim_team away_team on away_team.team_id = fm.away_team_id left join mart.dim_team player_team on player_team.team_id = fs.team_id order by fs.match_date desc, fs.match_id desc limit $6

with scoped_matches as ( select distinct fm.match_id from mart.fact_matches fm where $5=$6 and fm.league_id = any($1) and fm.season = $2 ), scoped_stats as ( select distinct pms.match_id from mart.player_match_summary pms inner join mart.fact_matches fm on fm.match_id = pms.match_id where $7=$8 and fm.league_id = any($3) and fm.season = $4 ) select (select count(*) from scoped_stats) as available_count, (select count(*) from scoped_matches) as total_count

with scoped as ( select pms.player_id, pms.player_name, pms.team_id, pms.team_name, pms.match_id, pms.match_date, coalesce(pms.minutes_played, $11) as minutes_played, coalesce(pms.goals, $12) as goals, coalesce(pms.assists, $13) as assists, coalesce(pms.shots_total, $14) as shots_total, coalesce(pms.shots_on_goal, $15) as shots_on_goal, coalesce(pms.yellow_cards, $16) as yellow_cards, pms.rating, row_number() over ( partition by pms.player_id order by pms.match_date desc, pms.match_id desc ) as rn_recent from mart.player_match_summary pms inner join mart.fact_matches fm on fm.match_id = pms.match_id where $17=$18 and fm.league_id = any($1) and fm.season = $2 ), filtered_scoped as ( select * from scoped where ($3::int is null or rn_recent <= $4) ), aggregated as ( select fs.player_id, max(fs.player_name) as player_name, max(fs.team_id) as team_id, max(fs.team_name) as team_name, count(distinct fs.match_id) as matches_played, sum(fs.minutes_played)::numeric as minutes_played, sum(fs.goals)::numeric as metric_value from filtered_scoped fs group by fs.player_id ), constrained as ( select * from aggregated where ($5::text is null or player_name ilike $6) and ($7::numeric is null or minutes_played >= $8) ), ranked as ( select c.player_id, c.player_name, c.team_id, c.team_name, c.matches_played, c.minutes_played, c.metric_value, dense_rank() over (order by c.metric_value desc nulls last, c.player_id asc) as rank from constrained c ) select r.*, count(*) over() as _total_count from ranked r order by r.rank asc, r.player_id asc limit $9 offset $10

with player_history as ( select dc.league_id, dc.league_name, pms.season, pms.team_id, coalesce(max(pms.team_name), dt.team_name) as team_name, count(distinct pms.match_id)::int as matches_played, sum(coalesce(pms.minutes_played, $2))::numeric as minutes_played, sum(coalesce(pms.goals, $3))::numeric as goals, sum(coalesce(pms.assists, $4))::numeric as assists, avg(pms.rating)::numeric as rating, max(pms.match_date) as last_match_date from mart.player_match_summary pms inner join mart.dim_competition dc on dc.competition_sk = pms.competition_sk left join mart.dim_team dt on dt.team_id = pms.team_id where pms.player_id = $1 group by dc.league_id, dc.league_name, pms.season, pms.team_id, dt.team_name ) select league_id, league_name, season, team_id, team_name, matches_played, minutes_played, goals, assists, rating, last_match_date from player_history order by last_match_date desc nulls last, matches_played desc, season desc, league_id asc, team_name asc

with scoped as ( select pms.match_id, pms.match_date, coalesce(pms.minutes_played, $6) as minutes_played, coalesce(pms.goals, $7) as goals, coalesce(pms.assists, $8) as assists, coalesce(pms.shots_total, $9) as shots_total, coalesce(pms.shots_on_goal, $10) as shots_on_goal, coalesce(pms.passes_total, $11) as passes_total, pms.rating, row_number() over ( partition by pms.player_id order by pms.match_date desc, pms.match_id desc ) as rn_recent from mart.player_match_summary pms inner join mart.fact_matches fm on fm.match_id = pms.match_id where pms.player_id = $1 and $12=$13 and fm.league_id = any($2) and fm.season = $3 ), filtered_scoped as ( select * from scoped where ($4::int is null or rn_recent <= $5) ) select to_char(date_trunc($14, fs.match_date), $15) as period_key, extract($16 from fs.match_date)::int as period_year, extract($17 from fs.match_date)::int as period_month, count(distinct fs.match_id)::int as matches_played, sum(fs.minutes_played)::numeric as minutes_played, sum(fs.goals)::numeric as goals, sum(fs.assists)::numeric as assists, sum(fs.shots_total)::numeric as shots_total, sum(fs.shots_on_goal)::numeric as shots_on_target, sum(fs.passes_total)::numeric as passes_attempted, avg(fs.rating)::numeric as rating from filtered_scoped fs group by date_trunc('month', fs.match_date), extract($18 from fs.match_date), extract($19 from fs.match_date) order by date_trunc($20, fs.match_date) desc

with scoped as ( select pms.player_id, pms.player_name, pms.team_id, pms.team_name, pms.position_name, pms.match_id, pms.match_date, coalesce(pms.minutes_played, $6) as minutes_played, coalesce(pms.goals, $7) as goals, coalesce(pms.assists, $8) as assists, coalesce(pms.shots_total, $9) as shots_total, coalesce(pms.shots_on_goal, $10) as shots_on_goal, coalesce(pms.passes_total, $11) as passes_attempted, coalesce(pms.yellow_cards, $12) as yellow_cards, coalesce(pms.red_cards, $13) as red_cards, pms.rating, row_number() over ( partition by pms.player_id order by pms.match_date desc, pms.match_id desc ) as rn_recent from mart.player_match_summary pms inner join mart.fact_matches fm on fm.match_id = pms.match_id where pms.player_id = $1 and $14=$15 and fm.league_id = any($2) and fm.season = $3 ), filtered_scoped as ( select * from scoped where ($4::int is null or rn_recent <= $5) ), latest_context as ( select fs.team_id, fs.team_name, fs.position_name from filtered_scoped fs order by fs.match_date desc, fs.match_id desc limit $16 ) select (select team_id from latest_context) as team_id, (select team_name from latest_context) as team_name, (select position_name from latest_context) as position_name, count(distinct fs.match_id) as matches_played, max(fs.match_date) as last_match_date, sum(fs.minutes_played)::numeric as minutes_played, sum(fs.goals)::numeric as goals, sum(fs.assists)::numeric as assists, sum(fs.shots_total)::numeric as shots_total, sum(fs.shots_on_goal)::numeric as shots_on_target, sum(fs.passes_attempted)::numeric as passes_attempted, sum(fs.yellow_cards)::numeric as yellow_cards, sum(fs.red_cards)::numeric as red_cards, avg(fs.rating)::numeric as rating from filtered_scoped fs

select count(distinct pms.match_id) as count_matches from mart.player_match_summary pms inner join mart.fact_matches fm on fm.match_id = pms.match_id where pms.player_id = $1 and $4=$5 and fm.league_id = any($2) and fm.season = $3

select fme.event_id, fme.time_elapsed as minute, cast($2 as integer) as second, cast($3 as text) as period, fme.event_type as type, fme.event_detail as detail, fme.team_id::text as team_id, team.team_name, fme.player_id::text as player_id, player.player_name from mart.fact_match_events fme left join mart.dim_team team on team.team_id = fme.team_id left join mart.dim_player player on player.player_id = fme.player_id where fme.match_id = $1 order by fme.time_elapsed asc nulls last, fme.event_id asc

with scoped_matches as ( select fm.match_id, fm.date_day, case when fm.home_team_id = $1 then coalesce(fm.home_goals, $13) else coalesce(fm.away_goals, $14) end as goals_for, case when fm.home_team_id = $2 then coalesce(fm.away_goals, $15) else coalesce(fm.home_goals, $16) end as goals_against, row_number() over ( order by fm.date_day desc, fm.match_id desc ) as rn_recent from mart.fact_matches fm where $17=$18 and (fm.home_team_id = $3 or fm.away_team_id = $4) and fm.league_id = any($5) and fm.season = $6 ), filtered_scoped as ( select * from scoped_matches where ($7::int is null or rn_recent <= $8) ) select fs.match_id::text as match_id, fs.date_day as played_at, case when $9 = fm.home_team_id then away_team.team_id else home_team.team_id end::text as opponent_team_id, case when $10 = fm.home_team_id then away_team.team_name else home_team.team_name end as opponent_team_name, case when $11 = fm.home_team_id then $19 else $20 end as venue_role, fs.goals_for, fs.goals_against from filtered_scoped fs inner join mart.fact_matches fm on fm.match_id = fs.match_id left join mart.dim_team home_team on home_team.team_id = fm.home_team_id left join mart.dim_team away_team on away_team.team_id = fm.away_team_id order by fs.date_day desc, fs.match_id desc limit $12

with scoped_matches as ( select fm.match_id, fm.provider, fm.competition_key, fm.competition_type, fm.league_id, fm.season, fm.season_label, fm.round_number, fm.round_name, fm.stage_id, fm.stage_name, fm.group_id, fm.tie_id, fm.leg_number, fm.is_knockout, fm.date_day, fm.home_team_id, fm.away_team_id, fm.home_goals, fm.away_goals, row_number() over (order by fm.date_day desc, fm.match_id desc) as rn_recent from mart.fact_matches fm where $12=$13 and fm.league_id = any($1) and fm.season = $2 ), filtered_matches as ( select * from scoped_matches sm where ($3::int is null or sm.rn_recent <= $4) ), enriched as ( select fm.match_id::text as match_id, fm.match_id::text as fixture_id, fm.league_id::text as competition_id, fm.competition_key, coalesce(dc.league_name, fm.league_id::text) as competition_name, fm.competition_type, fm.season::text as season_id, fm.season_label, fm.round_number::text as round_id, fm.round_name, fm.stage_id::text as stage_id, coalesce(fm.stage_name, ds.stage_name) as stage_name, ds.stage_format, fm.group_id::text as group_id, nullif(trim(rf.group_name), $14) as group_name, fm.tie_id::text as tie_id, ftr.tie_order, ftr.match_count as tie_match_count, fm.leg_number, fm.is_knockout, rf.date_utc as kickoff_at, coalesce(rf.status_short, rf.status_long) as status, dv.venue_name as venue_name, fm.home_team_id::text as home_team_id, home_team.team_name as home_team_name, fm.away_team_id::text as away_team_id, away_team.team_name as away_team_name, fm.home_goals as home_score, fm.away_goals as away_score from filtered_matches fm left join raw.fixtures rf on rf.fixture_id = fm.match_id left join mart.dim_competition dc on dc.league_id = fm.league_id left join mart.dim_stage ds on ds.provider = fm.provider and ds.stage_id = fm.stage_id left join mart.fact_tie_results ftr on ftr.tie_id = fm.tie_id left join mart.dim_team home_team on home_team.team_id = fm.home_team_id left join mart.dim_team away_team on away_team.team_id = fm.away_team_id left join mart.dim_venue dv on dv.venue_id = rf.venue_id ), filtered_rows as ( select * from enriched e where ($5::text is null or e.home_team_name ilike $6 or e.away_team_name ilike $7) and ($8::text is null or coalesce(e.status, $15) ilike $9) ) select f.*, count(*) over() as _total_count from filtered_rows f order by f.kickoff_at desc nulls last, f.match_id desc limit $10 offset $11

with scoped_matches as ( select fm.match_id, fm.date_day, case when fm.home_team_id = $1 then coalesce(fm.home_goals, $9) else coalesce(fm.away_goals, $10) end as goals_for, case when fm.home_team_id = $2 then coalesce(fm.away_goals, $11) else coalesce(fm.home_goals, $12) end as goals_against, row_number() over ( order by fm.date_day desc, fm.match_id desc ) as rn_recent from mart.fact_matches fm where $13=$14 and (fm.home_team_id = $3 or fm.away_team_id = $4) and fm.league_id = any($5) and fm.season = $6 ), filtered_scoped as ( select * from scoped_matches where ($7::int is null or rn_recent <= $8) ) select to_char(date_trunc($15, fs.date_day), $16) as period_key, extract($17 from fs.date_day)::int as period_year, extract($18 from fs.date_day)::int as period_month, count(*)::int as matches, sum(case when fs.goals_for > fs.goals_against then $19 else $20 end)::int as wins, sum(case when fs.goals_for = fs.goals_against then $21 else $22 end)::int as draws, sum(case when fs.goals_for < fs.goals_against then $23 else $24 end)::int as losses, sum(fs.goals_for)::int as goals_for, sum(fs.goals_against)::int as goals_against, sum(fs.goals_for - fs.goals_against)::int as goal_diff, sum( case when fs.goals_for > fs.goals_against then $25 when fs.goals_for = fs.goals_against then $26 else $27 end )::int as points from filtered_scoped fs group by date_trunc('month', fs.date_day), extract($28 from fs.date_day), extract($29 from fs.date_day) order by date_trunc($30, fs.date_day) desc

with scoped_matches as ( select fm.match_id, fm.date_day, case when fm.home_team_id = $1 then coalesce(fm.home_goals, $9) else coalesce(fm.away_goals, $10) end as goals_for, case when fm.home_team_id = $2 then coalesce(fm.away_goals, $11) else coalesce(fm.home_goals, $12) end as goals_against, row_number() over ( order by fm.date_day desc, fm.match_id desc ) as rn_recent from mart.fact_matches fm where $13=$14 and (fm.home_team_id = $3 or fm.away_team_id = $4) and fm.league_id = any($5) and fm.season = $6 ), filtered_scoped as ( select * from scoped_matches where ($7::int is null or rn_recent <= $8) ) select count(*)::int as matches_played, sum(case when goals_for > goals_against then $15 else $16 end)::int as wins, sum(case when goals_for = goals_against then $17 else $18 end)::int as draws, sum(case when goals_for < goals_against then $19 else $20 end)::int as losses, sum(goals_for)::int as goals_for, sum(goals_against)::int as goals_against, sum(goals_for - goals_against)::int as goal_diff, sum(case when goals_against = $21 then $22 else $23 end)::int as clean_sheets, sum(case when goals_for = $24 then $25 else $26 end)::int as failed_to_score, sum( case when goals_for > goals_against then $27 when goals_for = goals_against then $28 else $29 end )::int as points from filtered_scoped

select count(distinct fps.fixture_id) as count_matches from raw.fixture_player_statistics fps inner join mart.fact_matches fm on fm.match_id = fps.fixture_id where $4=$5 and fps.player_id = $1 and fm.league_id = any($2) and fm.season = $3

select fm.match_id::text as match_id, fm.match_id::text as fixture_id, fm.league_id::text as competition_id, fm.competition_key, coalesce(dc.league_name, fm.league_id::text) as competition_name, fm.competition_type, fm.season::text as season_id, fm.season_label, fm.round_number::text as round_id, fm.round_name, fm.stage_id::text as stage_id, coalesce(fm.stage_name, ds.stage_name) as stage_name, ds.stage_format, fm.group_id::text as group_id, nullif(trim(rf.group_name), $4) as group_name, fm.tie_id::text as tie_id, ftr.tie_order, ftr.match_count as tie_match_count, fm.leg_number, fm.is_knockout, rf.date_utc as kickoff_at, coalesce(rf.status_short, rf.status_long) as status, dv.venue_name as venue_name, fm.home_team_id::text as home_team_id, home_team.team_name as home_team_name, fm.away_team_id::text as away_team_id, away_team.team_name as away_team_name, fm.home_goals as home_score, fm.away_goals as away_score from mart.fact_matches fm left join raw.fixtures rf on rf.fixture_id = fm.match_id left join mart.dim_competition dc on dc.league_id = fm.league_id left join mart.dim_stage ds on ds.provider = fm.provider and ds.stage_id = fm.stage_id left join mart.fact_tie_results ftr on ftr.tie_id = fm.tie_id left join mart.dim_team home_team on home_team.team_id = fm.home_team_id left join mart.dim_team away_team on away_team.team_id = fm.away_team_id left join mart.dim_venue dv on dv.venue_id = rf.venue_id where fm.match_id = $1 and $5=$6 and fm.league_id = any($2) and fm.season = $3 limit $7

with competition_matches as ( select fm.home_team_id, fm.away_team_id, coalesce(fm.home_goals, $4) as home_goals, coalesce(fm.away_goals, $5) as away_goals from mart.fact_matches fm where $6=$7 and fm.league_id = any($1) and fm.season = $2 ), standings_base as ( select home_team_id as team_id, case when home_goals > away_goals then $8 when home_goals = away_goals then $9 else $10 end as points, home_goals - away_goals as goal_diff, home_goals as goals_for from competition_matches union all select away_team_id as team_id, case when away_goals > home_goals then $11 when away_goals = home_goals then $12 else $13 end as points, away_goals - home_goals as goal_diff, away_goals as goals_for from competition_matches ), standings as ( select sb.team_id, sum(sb.points)::int as points, sum(sb.goal_diff)::int as goal_diff, sum(sb.goals_for)::int as goals_for from standings_base sb group by sb.team_id ), ranked as ( select s.team_id, row_number() over ( order by s.points desc, s.goal_diff desc, s.goals_for desc, s.team_id asc )::int as position, count(*) over()::int as total_teams from standings s ) select position, total_teams from ranked where team_id = $3 limit $14
select player_id, player_name, nationality from mart.dim_player where player_id = $1

live_indexes.indexdef: CREATE INDEX idx_raw_match_events_assist_id ON ONLY raw.match_events USING btree (assist_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_raw_match_events_competition_season_label ON ONLY raw.match_events USING btree (competition_key, season_label)
CREATE INDEX idx_raw_match_events_fixture_id ON ONLY raw.match_events USING btree (fixture_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_raw_match_events_fixture_type ON ONLY raw.match_events USING btree (fixture_id, type)
CREATE INDEX idx_raw_match_events_player_id ON ONLY raw.match_events USING btree (player_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_raw_match_events_team_id ON ONLY raw.match_events USING btree (team_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX pk_match_events ON ONLY raw.match_events USING btree (provider, season, fixture_id, event_id)

live_conflict_index.indexdef: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX pk_match_events ON ONLY raw.match_events USING btree (provider, season, fixture_id, event_id)
